creator: CQG00620@nifty.ne.jp
text:
Hi.

Your patch causes errors when you run "make package" and
"make deinstall".

# make package
===>  Building package for mpg123-1.10.0
tar: lib/libmpg123.so.20: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
Creating package /usr/ports/packages/All/mpg123-1.10.0.tgz
Registering depends: libltdl-2.2.6b.
Creating gzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/packages/All/mpg123-1.10.0.tgz'
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/mpg123.
# make deinstall
===>  Deinstalling for audio/mpg123
===>   Deinstalling mpg123-1.10.0
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/lib/libmpg123.so.20' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is
incorrectly specified?)
# 

Try this patch:

diff -pruN mpg123.orig/Makefile mpg123/Makefile
--- mpg123.orig/Makefile	2009-12-21 19:04:26.000000000 +0900
+++ mpg123/Makefile	2009-12-21 19:12:15.000000000 +0900
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	mpg123
-PORTVERSION=	1.9.1
+PORTVERSION=	1.10.0
 CATEGORIES=	audio ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	SF \
 		http://www.mpg123.de/download/
diff -pruN mpg123.orig/distinfo mpg123/distinfo
--- mpg123.orig/distinfo	2009-11-21 04:56:08.000000000 +0900
+++ mpg123/distinfo	2009-12-21 19:11:56.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (mpg123-1.9.1.tar.bz2) = 39aa4407b53fa8c86f7d963bfe0702c9
-SHA256 (mpg123-1.9.1.tar.bz2) = 58b0a60abf9e437b955ea657d948e0815b5c6b1bad15c49f106c334086d82e34
-SIZE (mpg123-1.9.1.tar.bz2) = 736625
+MD5 (mpg123-1.10.0.tar.bz2) = 0005c9a89c381484e2d2ff450b3dfe5e
+SHA256 (mpg123-1.10.0.tar.bz2) = bcabf4549a4ed65770a80ff80ae54d471b064e2be22f1560764c007da834bc53
+SIZE (mpg123-1.10.0.tar.bz2) = 745415
diff -pruN mpg123.orig/pkg-plist mpg123/pkg-plist
--- mpg123.orig/pkg-plist	2009-08-21 03:53:59.000000000 +0900
+++ mpg123/pkg-plist	2009-12-21 19:11:56.000000000 +0900
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@ bin/mpg123
 include/mpg123.h
 lib/libmpg123.la
 lib/libmpg123.so
-lib/libmpg123.so.20
+lib/libmpg123.so.22
 lib/mpg123/output_dummy.la
 lib/mpg123/output_dummy.so
 lib/mpg123/output_oss.la

---
WATANABE Kazuhiro (CQG00620@nifty.ne.jp)
